limitations: Research references are architecture inspiration only.

does_not_prove: The research was fetched live by this command.
The research is sufficient for implementation or closure.
Any Tau runtime behavior changed because of the research.
proves: A research source packet was inspected deterministically.
Required source metadata, source URLs, relevance labels, and classifications were validated.
Research is marked review-required before it can affect Tau routing or implementation.
